name: combo-box
title: Combo Box
description: Filterable single-select built on Base UI's Combobox: a role=combobox input over a listbox popup with case-insensitive contains filtering, aria-activedescendant highlight tracking, an empty state, a clear button, Field wiring, a forced-colors-safe chevron, and 44px targets. The type-ahead upgrade to Select.
useWhen: Choosing one value from a long list users need to filter by typing (US states, agencies, service categories, countries)
A known but unfamiliar option set where type-ahead is faster than scanning
The user must pick an existing option rather than enter free text
avoidWhen: Short, familiar lists of roughly 5-15 options (use the native Select)
Fewer than ~5 options (use radio buttons so every choice is visible)
Free-text entry or values not constrained to a list (use an Input)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the input; Shift+Tab moves away
Down Arrow opens the list and moves the highlight to the next option; Up Arrow moves to the previous option
Typing filters the options (case-insensitive contains match) and keeps focus in the input
Enter selects the highlighted option and closes the list
Escape closes the list; pressing Escape again clears the input
The highlighted option is tracked with aria-activedescendant while focus stays on the input; the selected option carries aria-selected
Home / End jump to the first / last option in the list
